primary_catalyst.description: MAJOR overnight gap +3.59% on President Trump's two-week US/Iran ceasefire announcement (April 7 evening). Reversed weeks of Iran-war-driven tech selloff. NVDA/Meta/Amazon/Alphabet led Mag7 recovery. Chip complex surged: TSM +6%, ASML +9%, AMAT +9%, MU +8%, WDC +9%, LRCX +10%, INTC +11%. Trump administration also withdrew draft worldwide AI chip licensing proposal that would have required US approval for every large-scale GPU export â€” direct NVDA C1 positive.

force_attributions.rationale: Iran ceasefire was the dominant cross-asset risk regime shift â€” oil plunged, USD softened, risk-on resumed. Dominant driver of the +3.59% gap
Withdrawal of AI chip licensing proposal directly removed a key NVDA export-controls overhang â€” specific NVDA-positive policy event
Strait of Hormuz / TSMC supply chain relief â€” reduced tail-risk to NVDA foundry supply
Short-covering and rotation flows back into Mag7 after months of de-rating
